new_claims.claim_text: Iran has just attacked Kuwait’s Ministry of Oil building.
US and Israel bomb petrochemical facilities in Iran.
Al Jazeera confirms the US and Israel have bombed over 760 schools and 350 health centers in Iran.
new_claims.notes: Claim citing Al Jazeera, with video screenshot.

new_claims.claim_text: Trump has been taken to Walter Reed Hospital.
Automated sheep shearing video is Japan technology.
new_claims.notes: Initially presented as real, but a comment indicates it is AI-generated.
